name: Customer uses Ask a question on public quote; contractor sees inquiry on the activity feed
description: Inline 'Ask a question' form on the public quote — textarea + optional contact-back + optional name. POST /quotes/:id/inquiry emits a quote.inquiry domain event; the notification mapper converts that to a customer_replied notification with the question as the body so it shows under the bell on the contractor's dashboard.

persona.name: Asha Patel
persona.role: Wants to clarify timeline before deciding
persona.context: Loves the price; needs to know if Diego can start by Friday.

preconditions: Diego is logged in on /dashboard in another tab

steps.expect: Form expands inline: textarea, contact-back input ('Phone or email'), name input, teal 'Send question' CTA disabled until textarea is non-empty

steps.action: Types 'Can we start next week?' + contact-back '555-123-4567' → Send question
steps.expect: POST /api/quotes/{id}/inquiry returns 200; success card '✓ Question sent / Your contractor will follow up directly.' replaces the form

steps.action: Backend emits quote.inquiry event with { customerName, question, contactBack }
steps.expect: notify-on-event mapper produces a customer_replied notification with title 'Asha Patel asked a question' and body 'Can we start next week?'
New entry within 30s: msg icon + 'Asha Patel asked a question · just now'; clicking navigates back to the quote (entityType=quote)
Quote status is still 'sent' (inquiry doesn't change quote state); Accept/Ask/Decline panel returns to its idle layout — repeat-asks are allowed

evaluationCriteria.check: Success card uses teal (informational) coloring distinct from green-accept and pink-decline
Customer can ask without committing to either accept or decline — preserves optionality
Inquiry does NOT mutate quote.status; multiple inquiries on the same quote each create their own notification
Send button is correctly disabled when question text is empty/whitespace; aria-disabled mirrors the disabled attribute
